chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3409 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 24-01-2018 Mr. Bakhtiar Ahmed Panhwar advocate for petitoenr. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad. At the very outset, learned counsel for petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this constitutional petition if appropriate directions are given to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G. submits that neither the official respondents harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so, however, he further submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
